title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Rajkot. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services:
Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
